mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, category, top_flag, publish_time, publish_user FROM sys_info ORDER BY top_flag DESC, publish_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, title, content, category, top_flag, publish_time, publish_user FROM sys_info
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR publish_user LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY top_flag DESC, publish_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_info (title, content, category, top_flag, publish_time, publish_user) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{category}, IFNULL(#{topFlag}, 0), NOW(), #{publishUser})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_info SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, top_flag = IFNULL(#{topFlag}, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
